summary: Private 1:1 Chat (Step 3) fully tested. All backend APIs working correctly: POST /chat/direct/{target_user_id} creates/returns DM room (idempotent), GET /chat/rooms returns private rooms sorted by last_message date, POST /chat/messages sends messages, GET /chat/rooms/{room_id}/messages retrieves messages with sender info. Frontend chat page loads at /chat with rooms panel (left) and users panel (right), Private tab shows conversations sorted by last message with date timestamps, DM button on user sidebar starts private chat, Social card 'Messaggio' button starts private chat.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle for accessibility - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: Console shows 400 errors for some resources - may be related to avatar/image loading for offline users
DialogContent accessibility warnings - should add DialogTitle or VisuallyHidden wrapper
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users: Emilians, fabbro, mic, Benny
context_for_next_testing_agent: Private 1:1 Chat (Step 3) fully tested. Existing DM rooms: mic, Emilians, fabbro, Benny. Chat page at /chat with Public/Private tabs. Private rooms sorted by last_message date. DM can be started from: 1) User sidebar DM button (hover to reveal), 2) Social card 'Messaggio' button. Message model has image_url field ready for Step 4 image sending. Polling: 8s for messages, 30s for rooms/presence.

backend: POST /api/chat/direct/{target_user_id} - creates new DM room successfully
POST /api/chat/direct/{target_user_id} - duplicate call returns SAME room (idempotent)
POST /api/chat/direct/{target_user_id} - returns room with other_user info and is_online status
GET /api/chat/rooms/{room_id}/messages - retrieves messages with sender info
GET /api/chat/rooms - returns public and private rooms
GET /api/chat/rooms - private rooms sorted by last_message date (most recent first)
GET /api/chat/rooms - private rooms include last_message content
GET /api/chat/rooms - private rooms include other_user info with is_online
Message persistence verified - send then fetch confirms saved
Message model has required fields: id, room_id, sender_id, content, message_type, image_url, created_at
frontend: Chat page loads at /chat with data-testid='chat-page'
Private tab shows conversations sorted by last message date
Private rooms show last message preview and date timestamp
DM button on user in sidebar starts private chat
Social card 'Messaggio' button starts private chat
Chat input and send button work correctly
Sent messages appear in chat with timestamps
Empty state shows 'Nessun messaggio. Inizia la conversazione!' for new DMs
